scripts.check: bun run --sequential --filter '@cerulia/protocol' --filter '@cerulia/api' --filter '@cerulia/projection' check && bun run --filter '@cerulia/appview' verify
scripts.typecheck: bun run --sequential --filter '@cerulia/protocol' --filter '@cerulia/api' --filter '@cerulia/projection' build && bun run --filter '@cerulia/appview' check
